name: The Last Mask
descriptionSeed: The pure pole: falsehood so total it erases the possibility of truth. The ones here have unmade themselves — no original remains under the masks, and they will tell you that cheerfully, and you cannot check. **Halvex Coil's rewriting is this doctrine with better tools.** They regard him as a promising student who took it literally.
encounterFlavor: Masked ones with nothing behind the mask; a version of someone you know, and it is better, and it is not them; your own face, worn well.
questSeeds: Someone has come back from the Last Mask and everybody insists they are the same and you are not sure
A Veilwright of the Hall has begun quietly agreeing with the Last Mask

substrateSource.reason: A place that has been many places. Each one left its lattice behind and none of them left honestly.
substrateSource.radiusNote: `radius` is in legacy map units; `radiusWorld` is RADII on the sphere and is the one mechanics should use. Chosen by sweep against the authored worldPos: at this scale all 26 sources resolve on the correct side of their region baseline and calibration drift stays ~0.05. Larger radii blanket a whole region (a source at ~55% strength everywhere inside it) and renormalization cancels the field flat — the failure CCode measured and reverted.

worldPosNote: Deep expression of its Reach — placed near the equator on the the_veiled_reach bearing. (SNG-180: authored position — WHERE it sits. Independent of axisVector, which is WHAT it is; a bastion is where the two disagree.)
